title: hieracium pseudopilosella subsp. albarracina
intro: Hieracium pseudopilosella subsp. albarracina, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudopilosella subsp. albarracina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tincture or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
